title: Market Data Gateway AZ Failover Gap - Market Data Feed Outage
root_cause: Single availability zone deployment with no cross-AZ failover. AZ us-east-1a network partition caused 14 minutes of feed loss.
description: Market data feed ingest halted for 14 minutes due to AZ failure. No automated failover to secondary AZ. Trading was paused by risk controls.
remediation: Deploy second market data gateway instance in us-east-1b. Implement automatic failover with heartbeat monitoring.

title: Order Router Retry Storm - Connection Pool Exhaustion
root_cause: Retry configuration with exponential backoff not properly reset. Risk engine timeout caused exponential retry cascade, exhausting connection pools.
description: Order router exhausted Redis connection pool (2000/2000 connections) due to aggressive retries. New orders queued for 8 minutes.
remediation: Cap retry attempts at 3 with max jitter 200ms. Implement circuit breaker in order-router. Add connection pool monitoring.

title: Risk Engine Timeout Cascade - Dependency Timeout Propagation
root_cause: Risk engine synchronous calls to market-data-gateway without timeout. Market data feed delay propagated as cascade timeout affecting 4 downstream services.
description: Market data gateway latency spike (8 seconds) propagated through risk engine to order router, causing order processing delays of 4+ minutes.
remediation: Add 5-second timeout to market data calls. Implement circuit breaker for sync dependencies. Add timeout monitoring.

title: Pricing Service Memory Leak - Unchecked Cache Growth
root_cause: Volatility smile cache not evicting expired entries. Memory grew from 4GB to 28GB over 72 hours, causing GC pauses and slowness.
description: Risk engine pricing calls slowed to 2-3 seconds due to GC pauses. Risk calculations fell behind by 30+ seconds at market open.
remediation: Implement TTL-based cache eviction. Set max cache size to 8GB with LRU policy. Add memory monitoring alerts at 70%.

title: Position Manager Stale Cache - Data Consistency Issue
root_cause: Cache invalidation event lost due to async message broker hiccup. Portfolio manager and risk engine reading stale positions for 22 minutes.
description: Position cache diverged from database. Portfolio analytics reported incorrect PnL. Risk engine made decisions on stale positions.
remediation: Add cache version checking with database. Implement heartbeat validation every 5 minutes. Add dual-write for critical updates.

title: Notification Service Single AZ Failure - Alert Delivery Gap
root_cause: Single AZ deployment. Network issue in us-east-1c knocked out all notification processing for 9 minutes.
description: Risk limit breach notifications delayed by 9 minutes. Trade desk not alerted to position limits being exceeded.
remediation: Deploy notification service to second AZ. Add alert queuing for resilience. Implement dead letter queue for failed sends.

title: Settlement Service Database Connection Leak - Resource Exhaustion
root_cause: Unclosed database connections in error path. 300 connections leaked per day. After 4 days, connection pool exhausted (512/512).
description: Settlement operations blocked for 45 minutes as database connection pool exhausted. Trade settlement queued up in database.
remediation: Audit all DB connection paths. Add connection pool monitoring. Implement connection timeout at 30 minutes. Add automated pool reset.

title: Trade Execution Circuit Breaker Stuck Open - Silent Failures
root_cause: Circuit breaker stuck in open state after upstream service recovered. Manual intervention required to reset breaker.
description: Trade execution service stopped accepting orders for 34 minutes after order router recovered from outage. No alerts fired.
remediation: Implement half-open state with test requests. Add automatic reset after 60 seconds. Add circuit breaker state alerting.

title: Audit Log Service Disk Full - Compliance Logging Gap
root_cause: Audit logging spammed with INFO level events. Disk filled up after 8 days. No log rotation policy configured.
description: Audit logging stopped silently when disk reached 100%. 2+ hours of trading activity unlogged before detection.
remediation: Enable log rotation policy (daily, keep 7 days). Change default level to WARN. Add disk usage monitoring.

title: Risk Engine Missing SLO Definition - Unmonitored Performance
root_cause: Risk engine SLO never defined during initial deployment. Performance degradation not detected by monitoring.
description: Risk engine latency degraded from 150ms to 800ms p99 over 6 weeks. Not detected until order router timeout storm.
remediation: Define SLO: 99.99% at p99 latency < 200ms. Deploy monitoring and alerting. Review SLO baselines quarterly.
